title: EAC-BR Mock Auction Results
description: A set of auction results views which present the outcome of daily Enduring Auction Capability (EAC) - Balancing Reserve (BR) mock auction runs. The EAC-BR Mock Auction Results are updated daily in the morning and are available in the listed resources below. >** NOTE: ** EAC-BR Mock Auction Results are scheduled to be published on this page from 14th-23rd February 2024 only.
keywords: EAC-BR Mock Acution Results from EAC
